channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Saudi Arabia is tokenizing its multi-trillion dollar economy to protect its wealth from global shocks
item.description: The chairman of droppRWA has secured $12.5 billion in mandates to tokenized real estate and his plans are to go beyond properties to bring trillions of dollars onchain.

item.title: Tether Billionaire Enters UK's Richest People List Amid Farage Gift Inquiry
item.description: Christopher Harborne’s Rich List debut comes as Reform UK's Nigel Farage faces scrutiny over a $6.7 million gift from the Tether investor.

item.title: Lombard joins LayerZero exodus as $4 billion in assets switch to Chainlink's bridge
item.description: The shift comes after the Kelp DAO exploit drained $292 million from its LayerZero-powered bridge, increasing concerns over the security of cross-chain infrastructure.

item.title: Ethereum analysts see ‘downside risks’ as bears eye 20% ETH price drop
item.description: Ethereum analysts said that increasing supply on exchanges and declining ETF demand put ETH at risk of another leg down to $1,700.

item.title: CME, ICE push U.S. regulators to scrutinize Hyperliquid over manipulation risks
item.description: CME Group and ICE have reportedly warned the CFTC and Capitol Hill officials that Hyperliquid’s decentralized perpetual futures platform could enable market manipulation and sanctions evasion.

item.title: Iran war shows markets no longer sleep
item.description: The latest conflict involving Iran has produced an unexpected proving ground for financial infrastructure, and an unlikely winner has emerged, argues Huang.

item.title: Crypto’s CLARITY Act faces partisan fight over ethics on Senate floor
item.description: While Senator Tim Scott touted yesterday’s markup as bipartisan, just two Democratic senators supported the bill, and no Democratic amendments were adopted.

item.title: Crypto market structure bill clears key hurdle as ethics debate looms over floor vote
item.description: The Clarity Act cleared the Senate Banking Committee with bipartisan support, setting up a potential full Senate vote within weeks.

item.title: Bitcoin price dives under $79K as US bond market triggers 3% BTC price rout
item.description: Bitcoin joined stocks in a sell-off over US bond yields as BTC price action eyed its lowest levels for May after giving up gains.

item.title: Augustus CEO says banks can’t rebuild for AI and stablecoins
item.description: Augustus Bank CEO Ferdinand Dabitz says legacy clearing banks can’t be rebuilt for AI after the OCC grants conditional approval for its stablecoin-focused US bank push.

item.title: Bitcoin Giant Strategy Moves to Retire $1.5 Billion in Convertible Debt, Says It Could Sell BTC
item.description: Strategy is taking steps to pare down convertible debt with an agreement to repurchase $1.5 billion in notes—and again teased Bitcoin sales.

item.title: Bitcoin tumbles below $79,000 as rising bond yields, inflation worries rattle markets
item.description: Stocks, gold and crypto slide while crude oil tops $100 and traders rapidly reprice Fed expectations for rate hikes.

item.title: BloFin War of Whales 2026 Grand Prix opens registration for $5M trading championship
item.description: BloFin, a prominent global cryptocurrency exchange, has officially opened registration for its highly anticipated trading competition, the WOW (War of Whales) 2026 Grand Prix.

item.title: Getting Started With Myriad
item.description: Prediction market Myriad enables you to make predictions on real-world events and markets. Here’s how to get set up and start using it.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Kraken parent Payward cuts 150 staff, streamlining business ahead of planned IPO
item.description: The crypto exchange is also seeking fresh funding at a $20 billion valuation as it ramps up acquisitions and prepares for a public listing.

item.title: Gemini Stock Jumps on Revenue Rise, $100M Bitcoin Investment From Winklevoss Capital
item.description: Crypto exchange Gemini secured a $100 million Bitcoin investment from its founders’ fund, and revealed a 42% YOY Q1 revenue bump.

item.title: Polish lawmakers back revised crypto bill after repeated vetoes
item.description: Polish lawmakers approve a Ministry of Finance-backed crypto bill to implement the EU MiCA framework in a 241–200 vote after repeated vetoes.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: BNB is only gainer as index drops 2%
item.description: BNB (BNB) rose 0.4% while Bitcoin (BTC) fell 1.3% from Thursday.

item.title: XRP gives back gains after Senate crypto bill sparks 5% rally
item.description: XRP stayed pinned below resistance even as derivatives activity surged ahead of a key Senate vote that could formally reinforce the token’s commodity status.

item.title: Bitcoin Shrugs Off CLARITY Gains as Institutions Sell Amid Surging Treasury Yields
item.description: Analysts point to profit-taking, not panic, with ETF outflows at their worst pace since February as 10-year Treasury yield soars.

item.title: Bitcoin stalls above $80K despite CLARITY Act pass: What will trigger a breakout?
item.description: Bitcoin’s break above $82,000 and a return of strong institutional demand are prerequisites to confirm a trend change for BTC price.

item.title: Strategy to Repurchase $1.5B Convertible Notes, May Fund Deal With Bitcoin Sales Strategy disclosed in an 8-K filing that it has agreed to repurchase approximately $1.5 billion principal amount of its outstanding 0% Convertible Senior Notes due 2029 for an - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE8wV3lSN21rbzdLdVhSSExMNjBUN29tbnpkcm5xLTR2T1hvNDhlNkFOcGJhMXMzM0NEczIxR0UxNUlBQk50T3c4YjJocnh3RHlIRWRKaHBlNmN5NkN0dU5SS2RJdw?oc=5" target="_blank">Strategy to Repurchase $1.5B Con…

item.title: Strategy to repurchase $1.5 billion of 2029 convertible bonds using cash or bitcoin sales
item.description: Led by Michael Saylor, the company aims to retire half of its outstanding 0% 2029 converts as it restructures liabilities tied to its bitcoin treasury strategy.

item.title: Dune Analytics Slashes 25% of Workforce in AI, Institutional Pivot
item.description: Dune is restructuring around artificial intelligence and enterprise clients, shedding a quarter of its workforce in the process.

item.title: South Korea plans July rules for tokenized securities
item.description: South Korea's FSC is preparing detailed rules for tokenized securities before a legal framework for blockchain-based securities takes effect in February 2027.

item.title: Winklevoss’ Gemini jumps 25% on $100 million bitcoin infusion despite deepening losses
item.description: Gemini's revenue improved 42% year-over-year to $50.3 million, helping narrow its net loss by 27% from $149.3 million a year earlier.

item.title: Morning Minute: The Clarity Act Just Passed Its First Major Vote
item.description: The Clarity Act passed a bipartisan vote in its 1st checkpoint. Coinbase made a major deal with Hyperliquid and HYPE ripped on the news.

item.title: OKX, Korea Investment and Securities said to be in talks for 40% of Coinone
item.description: OKX's planned move into the South Korean market would echo that of Binance, which completed its acquisition of Seoul-based Gopax last year.

item.title: Bitcoin risks ‘next downtrend’ as traders diverge on fate of $82K resistance
item.description: Bitcoin traders split between a "massive catch-up" with stocks and the start of its "next downtrend" as BTC price action failed to flip $82,000 to support.

item.title: THORChain pauses trading after suspected $10M exploit
item.description: THORChain paused trading after ZachXBT flagged a suspected $10 million exploit spanning Bitcoin, Ethereum, BNB Chain and Base.

item.title: Crypto’s regulatory tailwind runs into a potential rates reset
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 15, 2026

item.title: Wall Street is starting to notice one of crypto’s smartest AI bets
item.description: A growing spotlight on Nof1’s Alpha Arena suggests SUI Group and Karatage may have gotten early to one of the most important experiments in finance: teaching AI how to trade in real markets.

item.title: Why is Hyperliquid's HYPE token price up 23% in one day?
item.description: Fresh US ETF launches and Coinbase’s Hyperliquid deal helped fuel HYPE’s rally this week, but technicals warn of a possible pullback.

item.title: OKX reportedly eyes Coinone stake in South Korea push
item.description: OKX is reportedly seeking a 20% stake in South Korean crypto exchange Coinone as foreign and domestic firms compete for market access.

item.title: THORChain’s RUNE Token Plunges Double Digits After $10M Exploit, Trading Halt
item.description: The liquidity protocol halted operations after blockchain researchers identified a suspected $10 million breach across multiple networks.

item.title: Hyperliquid leads 24-hour gains as altcoins pace bitcoin
item.description: HYPE’s surge is being fueled by Bitwise’s new spot Hyperliquid ETF and Coinbase’s expanded role as Hyperliquid’s official USDC treasury deployer.

item.title: Hana Bank to acquire $670 million stake in Upbit operator Dunamu
item.description: The South Korean bank announced plans for a won-pegged stablecoin, blockchain remittances and tokenized securities.

item.title: Thorchain halts trading after $10 million cross-chain exploit, RUNE token drops 12%
item.description: The cross-chain liquidity protocol paused all trading and signing on Friday after an attacker drained roughly $10.8 million across Bitcoin, Ethereum, BSC, and Base.

item.title: IREN closes $3 billion convertible notes deal amid AI infrastructure expansion
item.description: Bitcoin miner turned AI infrastructure operator secures one of the sector’s largest financings as investor demand drives multiple upsizes.

item.title: Strategy’s STRC stock logs record $1.5 billion trading volume, funds 11,707 bitcoin purchase
item.description: Heavy trading volume ahead of the ex-dividend date pushed STRC to its busiest session on record.

item.title: Hana Financial to acquire 6.55% stake in Upbit operator Dunamu for $668M
item.description: The purchase makes Hana Financial the fourth-largest shareholder in Dunamu, following several crypto-related deals in the last two months, as it dives deeper into the digital assets sector.

item.title: The U.S. stock market is getting close to dot-com bubble peak valuations
item.description: The Shiller cyclically adjusted price-to-earnings ratio for U.S. stocks is nearing the 1999 peak seen during the dot-com bubble.

item.title: The markets are still looking great for #Bitcoin. If this continues to find momentum going into next week, I would assume the breakout will happen then. Other than that, the 21-MA is nicely holding up as support, if that breaks, then we're in the path of potential fur - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5aRWIxZjJoSC1LWXhFeEVZNVFaM2lDVWpEX2p0a2tzYTV4ckY3OTR1RzZtQmRpYlpVSWVJeEdHZGJiVk02ajhNVnl0eVJsbUxQY2ZEOENlTjBZQzV0V2s2SDB4Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">The markets are still looking gr…

item.title: Signal hints it could leave Canada over lawful access bill
item.description: Signal's vice president of strategy said the firm “would rather pull out of the country” than comply with Bill C-22, which could threaten end-to-end encryption.

item.title: Australia’s proposed CGT changes could discourage long-term crypto holding
item.description: Robin Singh, CEO and founder of Koinly said the changes will hurt low-income crypto investors most and could encourage more short-term trading.

item.title: Kraken joins LayerZero exodus as it switches to Chainlink CCIP
item.description: LayerZero has come under scrutiny since it was exploited in April, as crypto protocols reevaluate their cross-chain providers and seek safer alternatives.

item.title: Strategy’s STRC hits record $1.5B trading volume
item.description: Strategy has leaned on Stretch to fund Bitcoin buys over the past 12 months as funding through senior convertible notes and at-the-market equity offerings has tightened.

item.title: Bullish shares dip on Q1 earnings miss, $605M loss
item.description: Bullish stock dropped in trading with the crypto exchange’s first-quarter earnings miss, adding to the crypto companies that have underperformed in the quarter.

item.title: 👀👀 $BTC $ETH Crypto spring is here - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFB0cC1hcHJ2ZGppWXlCNU9UOENjaXF3NmZxNXExQ2NrcklnSnY0NEtOUEhWSGwxUDNVLUliR0JLT0k0NDdFNi1WeXZpaWJTaXpZLVpMM2J6c1lkaElka1Q4?oc=5" target="_blank">👀👀 $BTC $ETH Crypto spring is here</…

item.title: Gemini reports 42% revenue growth after expansion into financial services
item.description: Gemini credit card revenue surged nearly 300% to $14.7 million in Q1, attributed to significant growth in its user base.

item.title: 1/ 🧵 Crypto already has 700M+ users globally. Over the past few years every catalyst — ETF approvals, institutional entry, stablecoin legislation — has driven growth. But the slope hasn't changed. Our research points to two reasons: user demand and awarene - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9pNWE2WTMxOEZ4UXpWYzFtbFVXUkpyVmNHbGx6VzYxZTJrUld5R181X0hxdlE2ampSMGNjZHBzSnJSd0pPMlZyYUx6a2FJamNabVFxN1ZaOG9FaXZxemlFdG91cVRMbjA?oc=5" target="_blank">1/ 🧵 Crypto already has 70…

item.title: OpenAI Pushes New ChatGPT Safety Features as Lawsuits Mount
item.description: OpenAI says ChatGPT can better detect signs of self-harm and violence as the company faces lawsuits and investigations over dangerous chatbot interactions.

item.title: Apple Mac M5 System Exploited With Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI, Researchers Claim
item.description: Security startup Calif says researchers used a preview version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI to help build an Apple macOS kernel exploit.

item.title: NFL All Day Stops Issuing NFTs as Dapper Labs Signals Future Plans With League
item.description: Dapper Labs said it has signed a new licensing agreement with the NFL as it discontinues the release of NFTs on its All Day platform.

item.title: Bitcoin Firm Strive Unveils Daily Dividend Payments for SATA Preferred Shares
item.description: Strategy's Michael Saylor called Strive's impending shift to daily dividend payments "impressive."

item.title: Kimi WebBridge Lets AI Agents Drive Your Browser—And Keep Your Data Local
item.description: Moonshot AI just shipped a browser extension that hands the wheel to AI agents. It clicks, scrolls, fills forms, and navigates your Chrome or Edge—without sessions ever leaving your machine.

item.title: #Bitcoin rallies back upwards, after a test at $79K and the 21-Day MA. The trend is not over. The trend looks to be continuing upwards. There are no arguments to be expecting a correction to happen, not at all. There are actually more arguments to be expectin - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBEMVZ5ZnNmYlJscEJJdFFrY2pYdHZUY01zLTJYOXUyZU5xaXFHc3lRVG00WFRZRWVpcXhnSkQwQks3V0pzUXE5RFpERGN2RXBvdmJpT3ltM0VRdVVZamJaV1RBUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">#Bitcoin rallies back upwards, a…

item.title: ChatGPT Is Losing Ground to Rivals—Here Are Some Numbers
item.description: ChatGPT's web traffic share is falling while its rivals are rising—just as businesses start to look beyond OpenAI.

item.title: CME Group Plans Launch of First Market Cap-Weighted Crypto Index Futures CME Group, the largest U.S. derivatives exchange, said it plans to launch Nasdaq CME Crypto Index futures on June 8, pending regulatory approval. The product will be CME’s first - x.com
